</style><script>
          (function(w) {
            w._reqQueue = []
            let _hasLoad
            let _reqTimmer
            let _lastErrorArgs
            function getCookie(name){
              var arr,reg=new RegExp("(^| )"+name+"=([^;]*)(;|$)");
              if(arr=document.cookie.match(reg)) 
              return unescape(arr[2]);
              else 
              return null;
            }
            function send() {
              if (!_reqTimmer) {
                _reqTimmer = setTimeout(function () {
                  if (!_reqTimmer) return
                  clearTimeout(_reqTimmer)
                  _reqTimmer = null
                  while (data = w._reqQueue.shift()) {
                    var image = new Image()
                    const url = '//msg-intl.qy.net/qos?p1=1_10_222&t=9&ct=js_error&u=' + getCookie(
                      'QC005') + '&mod=' + getCookie('mod') + '&lang=' + getCookie('lang') + '&diy_host=' + window.location.hostname + '&diy_errormsg=' + data.msg + '&ec=' + data.name + '&diy_extra=' + data.stack + '&diy_filename=' + data.filename + '&diy_site=' + data.position + '&diy_selector=' + data.tagname
                    image.src = url
                    image = null;
                  }
              }, 3000)
              }
            }
            function errorHandler(event) {
              // 防止重复监听导致的重复上报，一秒内的重复错误自动过滤
              var currArgs = (event + (Date.now() / 1e3 | 1));
              if (_lastErrorArgs === currArgs) return
              _lastErrorArgs = currArgs
              // 相同错误增加times，减少服务负载
              var last = w._reqQueue[w._reqQueue.length - 1];
              if (last && last.name === 'ScriptError' && event.message === last.msg) {
                last.times++;
                return
              }
              if (event.target && (event.target.src || event.target.href)) {
                w._reqQueue && w._reqQueue.push({
                  msg: event.message || '',
                  name: 'resourceError',
                  times: 1,
                  filename: event.target.src || event.target.href,
                  tagname: event.target.tagName
                })
              } else {
                w._reqQueue && w._reqQueue.push({
                  msg: event.message || '',
                  stack: (event.error && event.error.stack) || '',
                  name: 'ScriptError',
                  times: 1,
                  filename: event.filename,
                  position: (event.lineno || 0) + ":" + (event.colno || 0)
                })
              }
              if (_hasLoad) {
                send()
              }
            }
            w.addEventListener && w.addEventListener('error', function (event) { errorHandler(event) }, true)
            w.addEventListener && w.addEventListener('load', function () {
              _hasLoad = true
              send()
            })
          })(window);
        </script><style id="setSizeStyle"></style><script>
              function randomString(e) {    
                  e = e || 32;
                  var t = "ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTWXYZabcdefhijkmnprstwxyz2345678",
                  a = t.length,
                  n = "";
                  for (i = 0; i < e; i++) n += t.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * a));
                  return n
              }

              window._performance = {
                  eventId: randomString(6)
              }
            </script><script>
            var topBannerHeight = 0
            function getClientInfo() {
              return {
                clientWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth || document.body.clientWidth,
                clientHeight: document.documentElement.clientHeight || document.body.clientHeight
              }
            }

            function constructStyleString(selector, style) {
              var res = selector + ' {'
              var ks = Object.keys(style)
              for (var i = 0; i < ks.length; i++) {
                res += ks[i] + ': ' + style[ks[i]] + ';'
              }
              return res + '}'
            }

            function setSize(topBannerH) {
              var clientInfo = getClientInfo()
              var clientWidth = clientInfo.clientWidth;
              var clientHeight = clientInfo.clientHeight;

              topBannerHeight = topBannerH || 0;
              var baseAllSizeInfo = {
                1680: {
                  bottomGap: 90 + 44,
                  topGap: 70 + 20 + topBannerHeight,
                  rightSectionWidth: 366,
                  leftRightPadding: 80 * 2,
                  maxWidth: 366 + 1154 + 80 * 2,
                  minWidth: 366 + 688 + 80 * 2,
                },
                1280: {
                  bottomGap: 76 + 44,
                  topGap: 70 + 10 + topBannerHeight,
                  rightSectionWidth: 280,
                  leftRightPadding: 60 * 2,
                  maxWidth: 280 + 1154 + 60 * 2, // 其实是不会触发
                  minWidth: 280 + 688 + 60 * 2,
                },
                1024: {
                  bottomGap: 76 + 44,
                  topGap: 60 + 10 + topBannerHeight,
                  rightSectionWidth: 216,
                  leftRightPadding: 60 * 2,
                  maxWidth: 216 + 1154 + 60 * 2, // 其实是不会触发
                  minWidth: 216 + 688 + 60 * 2,
                }          
              }

              // 分辨率低于1024以下不处理
              if (clientWidth < 1024) {
                setSizeStyle.innerHTML = ''
                return
              }

              var curSizeInfo = baseAllSizeInfo[1280]
              if (clientWidth >= 1680) {
                curSizeInfo = baseAllSizeInfo[1680]
              } else if (clientWidth >= 1280) {
                curSizeInfo = baseAllSizeInfo[1280]
              } else if (clientWidth >= 1024) {
                curSizeInfo = baseAllSizeInfo[1024]
              } 

              let leftSectionWidth = clientWidth - curSizeInfo['leftRightPadding'] - curSizeInfo['rightSectionWidth'] // 以宽度计算 播放器理论宽度
              let leftSectionHeight = (leftSectionWidth * 9) / 16 // 以宽度计算 播放器理论高度
              let totalWidth = 0

              if (leftSectionHeight + curSizeInfo['topGap'] + curSizeInfo['bottomGap'] > clientHeight) {
                // 说明以宽度计算，此时放不下,
                leftSectionHeight = clientHeight - curSizeInfo['topGap'] - curSizeInfo['bottomGap'] // 以高度计算 播放器理论高度
                leftSectionWidth = (leftSectionHeight * 16) / 9 // 以高度计算 播放器理论宽度

                totalWidth = leftSectionWidth + curSizeInfo['rightSectionWidth'] + curSizeInfo['leftRightPadding'] //播放器容器理论宽度
              } else {
                totalWidth = 0
              }

              if (totalWidth > 0) {
                if (totalWidth < curSizeInfo['minWidth']) {
                  totalWidth = curSizeInfo['minWidth']
                }
                if (totalWidth > curSizeInfo['maxWidth']) {
                  totalWidth = curSizeInfo['maxWidth']
                }

                var styleString = constructStyleString('#setSizeStyle', {
                  width: totalWidth + 'px'
                })

                styleString += constructStyleString('.intl-video-wrap', {
                  width: totalWidth - curSizeInfo['rightSectionWidth'] - curSizeInfo['leftRightPadding'] + 'px'
                })

                setSizeStyle.innerHTML = styleString
              } else {
                setSizeStyle.innerHTML = ''
              }
            }
            window.setSize = setSize
            if (window.location.href.indexOf('/play') > -1) {
              window.setSizeStyle=document.getElementById("setSizeStyle")
              setSize()
              window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
                setSize()
              })
            }
          </script><script>

姜雪寧（ジアン・シュエニン）は皇后になるためにあらゆる手段を尽くしたが、宮廷クーデターの中で自殺せざるを得なかった。彼女の夢は権力から離れて富を築き、自分の人生を支配することだ。しかし、偶然の事故により、雪寧は宮廷に戻り、太師謝危（シエ・ウェイ）の生徒となる。彼女は彼の指導を受けながら、密かに計画を練り、迫り来る「血冠礼」の出来事を変えようとする。この事件によって、雪寧の幼なじみである燕临（イエン・リン）とその一族が反逆罪で陥れられ、全員が処刑される危機に瀕している。雪寧は策略を巡らし、燕家の命を救い、燕临は辺境に流罪にされた。血冠礼の騒動が過ぎ去った後、より大きな陰謀が徐々に表面化し、実は二十年前の平南王の反乱事件の真相を暴くことに直結していることが明らかになる。最終的に、雪寧は謝危と協力し、当時の真実を明らかにし、二人は最終的に結ばれる。","playLocSuffix":"%E5%AF%A7%E5%AE%89%E5%A6%82%E5%A4%A2-%E5%9D%A4%E5%AF%A7%E5%AE%AE%E3%81%AB%E5%92%B2%E3%81%8F%E6%86%A7%E3%82%8C-%E7%AC%AC1%E5%9B%9E-21dmxldtj4o?lang=ja","preview":0,"subtitleList":[],"albumPic":"http://pic0.iqiyipic.com/image/20250624/72/27/a_100513040_m_601_ja_m4.jpg","posterPic":"http://pic9.iqiyipic.com/image/20250624/10/15/a_100513040_m_600_ja_m3.jpg","lastPubTime":"20220720","cWebpImgSize":"480_270,284_160,1080_608,720_405,440_608,195_260,260_360,480_360,900_900,128_128,240_240,360_360","isExclusive":1,"categoryTagMap":{"Language":[{"name":"北京語","id":7906647948697233}],"SubjectMatter":[{"name":"時代","id":2822520805974533}],"TypeDsj":[{"name":"アイドル","id":1186904642514433},{"name":"恋愛","id":3723353052941633}],"Place":[{"name":"中国本土","id":6511681539546833}],"Adaptation":[{"name":"小説の改編","id":5038102877322033}]},"focusImage":{"focusImagesWithLang":[{"imageUrlWebp":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/lequ/common/lego/20230519/627704e782c5464f9f86401d1ab5d9af.webp","imageUrl":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/lequ/common/lego/20230519/627704e782c5464f9f86401d1ab5d9af.jpg","imageSize":"","type":"tv_image","resolution":""},{"imageUrlWebp":"http://pic9.iqiyipic.com/hamster/20251120/5d/a3/35d6f95107_xxx.webp","imageUrl":"http://pic9.iqiyipic.com/hamster/20251120/5d/a3/35d6f95107_xxx.png","imageSize":"","type":"title_image","resolution":"938*414"},{"imageUrlWebp":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/hamster/20231107/99/2c/339a0d7913_xxx.webp","imageUrl":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/hamster/20231107/99/2c/339a0d7913_xxx.jpg","imageSize":"1735_976,750_760,2603_1464,1125_1140","type":"background_tv","resolution":""},{"ima 60_360","score":"0.0","sourceCode":0,"posterWebpPic":"http://pic1.iqiyipic.com/image/20250624/e7/f2/a_100565212_m_600_ja_m1.webp","globalPublishTime":1729872000000,"subTitle":"","is1080":0,"season":0,"isShort":false,"contentType":1,"drm":"3,5,7,8,9","order":34,"publishTime":"20241026","horizontalCleanImage":{"webpSize":"1440_810","imageUrlWebp":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/jisu/20250903/57/02/4041e864ed9fca759f76839d66e23e1d.webp","imageUrl":"http://pic2.iqiyipic.com/jisu/20250903/57/02/4041e864ed9fca759f76839d66e23e1d.jpg","imageSize":"1440_810"},"firstPlayTimeOnlyDate":false,"count":0,"pImgSize":"480_270,284_160,1080_608,720_405,440_608,195_260,260_360,480_360,900_900,128_128,240_240,360_360","is3D":0,"isFinished":-1,"isQiyiProduced":0,"name":"大夢帰離","maxOrder":34,"shortName":"大夢帰離","isFollowFeatured":true,"volunteerTranslates":[],"tvCount":34,"desc":"贞元年、白泽神女が人間界と妖界を支配していたが、彼女の死によって白泽令が行方不明となり、妖獣は人間界で暴れ回り、数多くの凶悪な事件を引き起こしていた。その中で、百妖の王「朱厌」は人間の姿に変わり、「赵远舟」と名乗って自ら朝廷に投降し、妖を捕らえるために「缉妖司」の設立を提案する。文潇は彼に対する疑念と警戒心を抱きつつも、缉妖司に参加し、幼馴染である缉妖司のリーダー卓翼宸と共に、卓越した捜査力と剣術を駆使して事件に挑む。また、かつての狩妖人である高冷な弓箭手裴思婧、優れた医術を持ち、少し臆病な神童白玖も仲間に加わり、缉妖司の妖獣捕獲チームが結成される。彼らの前には、『山海経』に登場する妖獣たちが次々に現れる。\n事件を解決する中で、彼らは妖獣の悪行の背後に隠された残酷な真実に迫ることとなる。一方で、彼らの心には天命と愛人の間で揺れる切ない葛藤があり、缉妖小分隊の絆や、大荒の頂点に立つ妖獣と神女の愛が、この二つの選択を乗り越えられるかが試される。","playLocSuffix":"%E5%A4%A7%E5%A4%A2%E5%B8%B0%E9%9B%A2-%E7%AC%AC1%E5%9B%9E-rz7c6zo49o?lang=ja","preview":0,"subtitleList":[],"albumPic":"http://pic0.iqiyipic.com/image/20250624/b6/a5/a_100565212_m_601_ja_m2.jpg","posterPic":"http://pic1.iqiyipic.com/image/20250624/e7/f2/a_100565212_m_600_ja_m1.jpg","lastPubTime":"20241017","cWebpImgSize":"480_270,284_160,1080_608,720_405,440_608,195_260,260_360,480_360,900_900,128_128,240_240,360_360","isExclusive":0,"categoryTagMap":{"Language":[{"name":"北京語","id":7906647948697233}],"SubjectMatter":[{"name":"友情","id":7271332597318833},{"name":"時代","id":2822520805974533}],"Ages":[{"name":"古代","id":7055549984287633}],"TypeDsj":[{"name":"冒険","id":4748521006302333},{"nam
